description: User clicks the 'X' button to close the recordings and heat map overlay modal
page_title: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The user moves the cursor to the top right of the modal and clicks the close icon, revealing the main results dashboard.

description: User hovers over the 'Make a withdrawal from your...' task in the left-hand navigation sidebar
interaction_target: Make a withdrawal from your... task item
frame_description: The cursor lingers briefly over the second prototype test task in the sidebar.

description: User clicks on the 'What do you think a reasonable minimum withdrawal amount would be?' task in the sidebar
interaction_target: What do you think a reason... task item
frame_description: The user selects a multiple-choice question from the sidebar, causing the main content area to update with the corresponding survey results.

description: The main dashboard content updates to display the results for the selected multiple-choice question
frame_description: The screen transitions from showing task paths/heatmaps to showing a bar chart of survey responses.
